race.comment: LETHAL THOUGHTS (1) has been knocking firmly on the door and, despite a run of minor placings, his consistency reads well in a race of this nature. He again shaped strongly behind a smart winner last time and, with that form stacking up, this looks a very suitable chance for him to break through. MANIFEST THE MILLI (7) tackled stronger company at Caulfield second up and is worth another chance on the strength of his fresh maiden success, while NAVAL FORCE (11) has been thereabouts in recent starts and caught the eye finishing off well latest, suggesting he'll be charging home late. BLAKMAX (3) can give a sight if able to build on recent efforts.
